review:
I was frequenting this place a lot lately on account of my baby's many food intolerances. This restaurant has a great vegan and allergen menu which was awesome for me to be able to actually go out and eat without worrying. My review would initially have been five stars on account of good food and decent service. However during my last visit I was disgusted, when I saw one of the cooks exiting the bathroom while zipping up his fly. To me it looks like he did his business, didn't wash his hands, and proceeded to walk straight back into the kitchen (which is visible to the public) and continue cooking. So gross. We were on our way out when I saw this happen otherwise I wouldn't have eaten the food. Won't be going back to this location.

Update: I was in contact with the owner who is very kind. Per Kevin and the manager at this location, the hand hygiene issue was addressed with the cooks. I wasn't asked any specifics of when this happened or who it was but I'm hoping this helps prevent it from happening again.
